2.name: Enveloped Rage (Greater)
2.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased by 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.
2.note: multi-enemy (AoE) — excluded vs a single boss

3176.name: Resourceful Forte (Greater)
3176.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave maximum increases by 20%. Gain 3.5% Forte.

1090.name: Vale (2/2)
1090.description:
2 of Set: Adventurer's Might
When you use an encounter power, you have a 10% chance to increase a Boost based on your role by 4% for 10 seconds.

Tank: Stamina Regeneration
Healer: Action Point Gain

1229.name: Sun (2/2)
1229.description:
2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 5%.

While in Barovia, your Damage Resistance and Movement Speed are also increased by 5%.

While in Barovia during nightfall, your Base Damage Boost, Damage Resistance, Overall Outgoing Healing, and Movement Speed are increased by 10%.

zoneEffects.notes: Nightfall values supersede the regular Barovia bonuses.

1959.name: Mirage (2/2)
1959.description:
2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become a Master of Illusion for 10 seconds! As a Master of Illusion you will summon an illusion of yourself to fight for you, attacking your enemies! Be forewarned, illusion magic can occasionally produce fowl results!

A Master of Illusion also does 3% more damage, which increases by 10% against enemies with Shields and Temp HP.

You can only be a Master of Illusion once every 30 seconds.

1969.name: Aboleth (2/2)
1969.description:
2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you will become Far-Influenced, which increases your Outgoing Damage by 4% and grants you a random buff for 10 seconds.

Relentless - Increases your Critical Strike by 2500.

Tainted Attack - Enemies you attack will take additional damage over time.

Impeding Death - Enemies you attack will explode on death, doing damage to other foes.

You can only be Far-Influenced once every 30 seconds.

1979.name: Fey (2/2)
1979.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become Fey-Touched, which restores 10% of your AP, as well as increases your Base Damage Boost by 3% and your Overall Outgoing Healing by 6% for 10 seconds. You can only be Fey-Touched once every 30 seconds.

proc.notes: Restores 10% AP and grants +3% Outgoing Damage and +6% Outgoing Healing for 10s. Can occur once every 30s.

values_by_id.2696: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power (1.5s CD), 1 charge per 3s in combat. Unleashed grants: +4.5% Base Damage Boost. Charges and Unleashed lasts 20s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

2791.description: When you are 20' or closer to your target, your Critical Strike is increased by 7.5%. When you are 20' or further away from your target, your Forte is increased by 7.5%.

2791.description: When you are 20' or closer to your target, your Power is increased by 7.5%. When you are 20' or further away from your target, your Power is increased by 7.5%.

4006.name: Positional Advantage
4006.description: [pending re-verify — small/dark capture] When 20' or closer to your target, Critical Strike is restored. When 20' or further, Movement Speed is increased by 7.3%.

5360.description: When moving in combat gain a buff every 2 seconds that increase your Critical Severity by 3% for 6 seconds. Max 3 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.

6874.description: When in combat with 2 or more enemies, your Critical Strike is increased by 8.5%. When you are in combat with 1 or less enemies, the buff is removed.

5362.name: Charged Defiance
5362.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, you take 3% less damage.

6877.name: Combatant's Advantage
6877.description: For every 2 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1.1% Defense and lose 1.2% Combat Advantage. Max 5 Stacks: +5.5% Defense and -6% Combat Advantage.

5363.name: Graceful Harmony
5363.description: You gain 1% Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 20' or closer to you, their Forte is increased by 1%.

5363.name: Graceful Harmony
5363.notes: Applies to YOURSELF too (you are within 20' of yourself) — same ruling as Bloodwoven Graceful Harmony (proven 2026-07-05); party members additionally get it via the party-buff channel.

6872.condition: scales with current HP %, full effect at full HP

6872.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Outgoing Healing, up to a maximum of 6% & Power up to 1.5%. Currently: 6% Outgoing Healing and 1.5% Power.

5364.description: Gain up to 8% Critical Avoidance based on your health percentage.

7395.name: Survivors Healing Aura
7395.description: When your health is 50% or lower you gain 5% Incoming Healing for 6 seconds. Teammates who are 25' or closer to you gain 5% Incoming Healing for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 15s.

5365.name: Bloodletting
5365.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Maximum Hit Points by 10% and gain 3.5% Damage for 10 seconds.

6873.name: Reckless Advantage
6873.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Advantage, increasing your Combat Advantage by 1.4% but decreasing your Critical Avoidance by 1.5% for 5 seconds. Max 5 stacks: +7% Combat Advantage and -7.5% Critical Avoidance.

5439.name: Encounter Reprieve
5439.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Encounter Power cooldowns by 1 second. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

6875.name: Sprinter's Advantage
6875.description: When moving during combat, gain a buff that increases your Power by 2.5% and Combat Advantage by 3.5% for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds.

5445.name: Indefatigable Advantage
5445.description: When your Stamina is under 25%, your Power is increased by 3.5%.

7388.name: Charged Rejuvenation
7388.description: Whenever you are healed in combat, gain 4.5% Recharge Speed for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown)
7388.note: triggered proc, low uptime (10s buff, 30s cooldown)
